title: Cell Surface Mild Acid Elution of MHC-bound Immunopeptides
author: Teesha C Luehr
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y6ffzbn

steps.title: Culture cells
steps.instruction: Culture cells. If culturing THP-1s, follow the protocol. Culturing THP-1 Cells by Teesha C Luehr

steps.title: Grow cells to a total number of 1-2x10*8 cells
steps.instruction: Grow cells to a total number of 1-2x10*8 cells

steps.title: 1X PBS at 25 °C, (room...
steps.instruction: 1X PBS at 25 °C, (room temperature) 8 g, NaCl 0.2 g, KCl 1.44 g, NA2HPO4 0.24 g, KH2PO4 1 L, Milli-Q water pH adjust to 7.4 with 37% HCl

steps.title: 1X PBS at 4 °C This...
steps.instruction: 1X PBS at 4 °C This PBS solution does NOT have to be sterile, but make sure it is clearly marked.

steps.title: 1X saline (PBS without the phosphate)...
steps.instruction: 1X saline (PBS without the phosphate) at 4 °C 4 g, NaCl 0.1 g, KCl 500 mL, Milli-Q water no need to pH adjust, it's not a buffer no need to sterilize as the mild acid elution is not done under sterile conditions

steps.title: 1X saline + 2% acetic acid...
steps.instruction: 1X saline + 2% acetic acid at 4 °C 245 mL, of above 1X saline solution 5 mL, acetic acid

steps.title: Cells will most likely be in 250 mL, complete media
steps.instruction: Cells will most likely be in 250 mL, complete media . Use five 50 mL, conical tubes to pellet all cells from one flask at a time.

steps.title: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g
steps.instruction: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g

steps.title: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up...
steps.instruction: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up and down 5X with 5 mL, room temp PBS (sterile in the hood)

steps.title: Combine all five conical tubes into one
steps.instruction: Combine all five conical tubes into one

steps.title: If cell count is not know,...
steps.instruction: If cell count is not know, perform one now to confrim a minimum of 1x10*8 cells

steps.title: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g
steps.instruction: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up...
steps.instruction: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up and down 5X with 10 mL, cold PBS

steps.title: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g
steps.instruction: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up...
steps.instruction: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up and down 5X with 10 mL, cold PBS

steps.title: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g
steps.instruction: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up...
steps.instruction: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up and down 5X with 10 mL, cold saline

steps.title: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g
steps.instruction: Pellet cells for 00:03:00, at 500g

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up...
steps.instruction: Resuspend each pellet by pipetting up and down 5X with 10 mL, cold 2% acetic acid in saline EXTREMELY IMPORTANT, REMEMBER THAT THE PEPTIDES WILL BE IN THE SUPERNATANT

steps.title: DO NOT DISCARD SUPERNATANT
steps.instruction: DO NOT DISCARD SUPERNATANT

steps.title: Collect the supernatant in a new 50 mL, conical tube
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant in a new 50 mL, conical tube

steps.title: Transfer cells + saline to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer cells + saline to a new 50 mL, conical tube This is to remove any large amounts of phosphate

steps.title: Each 250 mL, T-175 flask will...
steps.instruction: Each 250 mL, T-175 flask will require 7 50 mL, conical tubes

steps.title: Freeze supernatant at -80 °C, overnight
steps.instruction: Freeze supernatant at -80 °C, overnight

steps.title: Lyophilize sample for 48 hours
steps.instruction: Lyophilize sample for 48 hours

steps.title: Peptides are now ready to be...
steps.instruction: Peptides are now ready to be desalted with chosen clean up method (STAGE tip, LC-UV, combination, etc)
